SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am12
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.UI.CLI

Interface CLIDrawBuffer

All Known Implementing Classes:
CLIDrawBufferGrid, CLIDrawBufferHand, CLIDrawBufferTable, CLIObjectivesBuffer
public interface CLIDrawBuffer
Interfaces used by all the buffers in the CLI. These buffers are used for the graphical part of the CLI, in particular to print informations in a more pleasant way and that is more similar to reality

  • Method Details

    • extractCardfromIndex

      List<String> extractCardfromIndex(int index, boolean side)
      Method to transform the integer value, the index, that travels in the network in the graphical and printable way, a list of strings
      Parameters:
      index - the integer value corresponding to a exact card
      side - a boolean that represents the side of the card wanted by the player
      Returns:
      a list of strings, the representation of the card

    • printBuffer

      void printBuffer()
      Method used to print the buffer in the CLI
